title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Malabar Gold & Diamonds in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
